title: hieracium symphytaceum subsp. polyadenum
intro: Hieracium symphytaceum subsp. polyadenum, also known as a lesser hawk's-beard, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Hieracium symphytaceum subsp. polyadenum are believed to include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
